entries.name: code-review
entries.description: One sub-path from one GitHub repo, tracked on main.

entries.name: anthropic-bundle
entries.description: Many skills from one repo. With multi-path, each landing dir is the basename (or per-path 'as' alias) and the entry name is metadata only.

entries.name: internal-runbooks
entries.description: Private repo pinned to an immutable commit. Use $CONDUIT_GITHUB_TOKEN.

entries.name: house-style
entries.description: A local in-house skill, kept under version control next to this manifest.

entries.name: parked-for-later
entries.description: Disabled entries are skipped at sync time but kept for documentation.
